/usr/bin/ar qc libeuxis-cli-lib.a "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/omnigraph.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/terminal.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/term_caps.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/box.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/config_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/pii_filter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/process.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/registry_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/provider_router.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/provider_executor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/auth_profile_store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cli_provider.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/system.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/fleet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/knowledge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/infra.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/dev.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli-lib.dir/src/cmd/specialized.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libeuxis-cli-lib.a
